creator: chrysalis@chrysalisnet.org
text:
An update since ruby26 has a unresolved security flag on it I tried to see if portupgrade would work on ruby27.

portsdb -u yields

portsdb: uninitialized constant PkgDBTools::DBError

portupgrade itself yields.  I did recompile ruby-bdb and portupgrade as well.

Traceback (most recent call last):
        9: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:2380:in `<main>'
        8: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:238:in `main'
        7: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:238:in `new'
        6: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/2.7/optparse.rb:1093:in `initialize'
        5: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:531:in `block in main'
        4: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pkgtools/pkgtools.rb:242:in `init_pkgtools_global'
        3: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pkgtools/portsdb.rb:168:in `setup'
        2: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pkgtools/pkgdbtools.rb:100:in `db_driver='
        1: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:54:in `require'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:54:in `require': cannot load such file -- dbm (LoadError)
        8: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:2380:in `<main>'
        7: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:238:in `main'
        6: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:238:in `new'
        5: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/2.7/optparse.rb:1093:in `initialize'
        4: from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:531:in `block in main'
        3: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pkgtools/pkgtools.rb:242:in `init_pkgtools_global'
        2: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pkgtools/portsdb.rb:168:in `setup'
        1: from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pkgtools/pkgdbtools.rb:63:in `db_driver='
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/pkgtools/pkgdbtools.rb:104:in `rescue in db_driver=': uninitialized constant PkgDBTools::DBError (NameError)
Did you mean?  LoadError
